overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic desert city district during golden hour. The player passes vending machines, crosses streets, and approaches a large amusement park ferris wheel while a flying vehicle passes overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with vending machines and palm trees

events.description: passing the green industrial dumpster on the right side of the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past vending machines and dumpsters, approaching a street intersection

notable_agents.action: person in red clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the intersection

entered.detail: green and blue automated food vending machines with 'BURRITO XXL' signage
large green metal dumpster with rust marks sitting on the sidewalk
tall palm trees lining the street with brown trunks and green fronds
large circular metal framework with billboards suspended over the street
reddish-brown rocky hills and mountains visible in the distance beyond the city

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of futuristic vending machines lining the left side of a sunlit street. The camera moves forward past a green dumpster and palm trees, approaching an intersection with a pedestrian in red visible ahead. The warm golden hour light casts long shadows across the asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with art deco commercial building

events.description: turning left around the corner of the art deco commercial building
emerging from behind the building to reveal open plaza with tall industrial towers in the distance

agents.ego_description: navigating around the corner of a commercial building and continuing down the street toward the open plaza

entered.detail: low-rise building with curved roof, red trim, and a spire structure on top with graffiti on the walls
massive futuristic skyscraper with the number '07' displayed prominently on the facade
tall metal pole with dual lamps and electrical boxes attached

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left around a distinctive art deco building with graffiti-covered walls, revealing a wider urban landscape. As the building passes out of view, the massive '07' industrial tower becomes visible in the distance against the blue sky, marking the transition to a more open plaza area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with futuristic towers and amusement structure

events.description: flying vehicle passes overhead from right to left across the sky
approaching the large ferris wheel amusement structure dominating the skyline ahead

agents.ego_description: walking while looking up at the flying vehicle passing overhead, then continuing toward the amusement park structure

notable_agents.action: futuristic flying car with green and white coloring passing overhead from right to left

entered.detail: futuristic hovering car with illuminated thrusters flying above the street
massive circular metal framework with purple and white lights forming an amusement park centerpiece
multi-story buildings with grid-patterned facades and flat roofs

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through an open plaza with the massive '07' tower now prominent on the left. A futuristic flying vehicle suddenly passes overhead, drawing the view upward before the camera continues toward an enormous illuminated ferris wheel structure that dominates the center of the frame. The scene transitions from urban street to amusement park entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: amusement park entrance under ferris wheel

events.description: walking under the massive ferris wheel structure, entering its shadow
passing by street vendors and pedestrians gathered near the amusement entrance

agents.ego_description: walking under the ferris wheel structure, navigating past pedestrians and street vendors near the amusement park entrance

notable_agents.action: person in white jacket and cap walking toward the camera on the sidewalk
person sitting on the ground near cardboard boxes and vendor stalls

entered.detail: striped canvas awning covering a small vendor stall with goods displayed underneath
stacked cardboard boxes and crates piled near the building wall
red and white striped concrete barriers lining the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and walks beneath the massive illuminated ferris wheel, which now fills the sky overhead. The environment becomes busier with pedestrians, including a person in a white jacket walking toward the camera and another sitting near vendor stalls. The lighting shifts to a mix of sunlight and the purple glow from the amusement structure above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit futuristic district that transitions from a narrow urban street into a sprawling amusement park plaza. It begins by gliding past futuristic vending machines and palm trees under a warm golden hour light, moving toward a pedestrian-filled intersection. As the camera turns left around a graffiti-covered art deco building, the view opens up to reveal a massive industrial tower standing against the blue sky. The scene then expands into a wide plaza where a flying vehicle streaks overhead, drawing the gaze upward before the camera advances toward an enormous illuminated ferris wheel. Finally, the camera walks beneath the towering structure, where the golden sunlight blends with a purple glow amidst a crowd of pedestrians and vendor stalls.
